# pihole_setting (Data Source)

Reads a PiHole configuration setting. The value is returned as a JSON-encoded string — use jsondecode() to parse it.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pihole_setting" "block_ttl" {
  key = "dns.blockTTL"
}

output "block_ttl" {
  value = jsondecode(data.pihole_setting.block_ttl.value)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) Dot-notation config path (e.g. webserver.api.app_sudo).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `value` (String) JSON-encoded current value. Use jsondecode() to parse.
